case_title: GINSBERG, JUDITH VS ROSSOFF, MICHAEL S. ATTORNEY AT LAW

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY GINSBERG, JUDITH AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSOFF, MICHAEL S.  ATTORNEY AT LAW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
